title: Buying Electronics 买电子产品
scene: 爸爸带儿子去电子产品店买一个学习用的平板电脑。

lines.en: Hello, I'm looking for a tablet for my son. He needs it for studying.
lines.zh: 你好，我想给儿子买一个平板电脑。他学习用。

lines.en: We have several models. What's your budget?
lines.zh: 我们有几款型号。您的预算是多少？

lines.en: Around two thousand yuan. Something simple but good quality.
lines.zh: 大约两千元。简单一点但质量好的。

lines.en: Dad, I also want to use it for reading and watching English videos.
lines.zh: 爸爸，我也想用它来看书和看英语视频。

lines.en: This model is perfect. It has a big screen and good speakers.
lines.zh: 这款很合适。屏幕大，音质好。

lines.en: How long does the battery last?
About eight hours. That's enough for a full day of study.
lines.zh: 大约八小时。足够学一整天了。

lines.en: Can I try it? I want to see how it feels.
lines.zh: 我能试试吗？我想感受一下。

lines.en: Of course! Here, you can play with this display model.
lines.zh: 当然可以！来，您可以试试这个展示机。

lines.en: It looks nice. We'll take this one. Does it come with a case?
lines.zh: 看起来不错。我们买这款。有送保护壳吗？
